author: Yevhen Shramov
name: FlashMuon + LinearScaleInit + XSA5LastGated + RReLU2 + Int6AWQ
blurb: 10-layer SP-1024 run with Flash Muon, XSA on the last 5 layers with only the final XSA layer gated, linear-by-depth scale init, RReLU2 MLP, late EMA plus post-train best-choice selection, and int6 AWQ + lzma with val-tail calibration. Final reported score uses stride-64 sliding-window evaluation at 1.1834 bpb; the default contiguous roundtrip score is 1.2064 bpb. Total submission size is 15,361,671 bytes.
